episode_name: Main Gaza war phase / Operation Protective Edge
theater_description: The 50-day Gaza war from 8 July to 26 August 2014. Israeli deaths and attacks on Israel matter to conflict context, but the core DR path is estimated from status-classified Palestinian deaths in Gaza.
geometry_method_note: The entire Gaza Strip is treated as the civilian theater because hostilities and displacement were strip-wide during the 50-day war.
military_area_note: Armed-group exposure is bounded to militants operating in Gaza during the war, not to any whole-country military population.
civilian_area_note: Using the full Gaza Strip civilian population is justified because the strip itself was the enclosed war theater and the civilian population remained exposed throughout the episode.
split_reason: Single bounded 2014 war phase with strong direct-death documentation and an explicit militant-force estimate for the theater.
quality_note: Status-classified fatalities and the Gaza population denominator are strong. The remaining uncertainty is mostly the size of the armed-group population actually exposed in the theater.
